paperTitle: scTenifoldKnk: An efficient virtual knockout tool for gene function predictions via single-cell gene regulatory network perturbation

knockout_gene.tip: Gene symbol that remains present after filtering.

why_this_exists.zh: This skill turns scTenifoldKnk into a routable, validated, and report-producing execution contract for virtual knockout on WT single-cell expression matrices.
why_this_exists.en: This skill turns scTenifoldKnk into a routable, validated, and report-producing execution contract for virtual knockout on WT single-cell expression matrices.

when_to_use.zh: Use when the task starts from a WT scRNA-seq matrix and needs virtual knockout plus perturbation or differential-regulation outputs.
when_to_use.en: Use when the task starts from a WT scRNA-seq matrix and needs virtual knockout plus perturbation or differential-regulation outputs.

when_to_use.zh: Use when the user needs the core WT-only workflow clearly separated from manuscript-style reproduction branches.
when_to_use.en: Use when the user needs the core WT-only workflow clearly separated from manuscript-style reproduction branches.

when_not_to_use.zh: Do not use for real CRISPR KO experimental design, generic differential expression, or multi-sample integration.
when_not_to_use.en: Do not use for real CRISPR KO experimental design, generic differential expression, or multi-sample integration.

when_not_to_use.zh: Do not use when no WT input matrix is available.
when_not_to_use.en: Do not use when no WT input matrix is available.

route_elsewhere.zh: If the task is still upstream FASTQ-to-matrix processing, route to an alignment or quantification skill.
route_elsewhere.en: If the task is still upstream FASTQ-to-matrix processing, route to an alignment or quantification skill.

route_elsewhere.zh: If the task is bulk RNA-seq differential expression, route to a bulk differential-expression skill.
route_elsewhere.en: If the task is bulk RNA-seq differential expression, route to a bulk differential-expression skill.

formats.name: input_manifest.json
formats.zh: The preferred input is a JSON manifest that declares matrix paths and object state.
formats.en: The preferred input is a JSON manifest that declares matrix paths and object state.

formats.name: matrix_market_or_csv
formats.zh: Expression matrices may be Matrix Market or CSV, but the manifest must state orientation and whether they are raw counts.
formats.en: Expression matrices may be Matrix Market or CSV, but the manifest must state orientation and whether they are raw counts.

file_fields.zh: The WT expression matrix path must exist.
file_fields.en: The WT expression matrix path must exist.

state_requirements.zh: The WT matrix must be organized as genes in rows and cells in columns.
state_requirements.en: The WT matrix must be organized as genes in rows and cells in columns.

state_requirements.zh: Core input should remain raw or otherwise unnormalized so method-level preflight assumptions are not silently bypassed.
state_requirements.en: Core input should remain raw or otherwise unnormalized so method-level preflight assumptions are not silently bypassed.

state_requirements.zh: The matrix must retain gene names so the wrapper can verify that the knockout gene exists.
state_requirements.en: The matrix must retain gene names so the wrapper can verify that the knockout gene exists.

state_requirements.zh: The manifest must explicitly declare whether this is the core WT-only path or the paper-reproduction path.
state_requirements.en: The manifest must explicitly declare whether this is the core WT-only path or the paper-reproduction path.

required_user_decisions.zh: The knockout gene must be provided and confirmed to remain present after filtering.
required_user_decisions.en: The knockout gene must be provided and confirmed to remain present after filtering.

required_user_decisions.zh: The user must confirm whether the run targets the core WT-only analysis or a paper-reproduction branch.
required_user_decisions.en: The user must confirm whether the run targets the core WT-only analysis or a paper-reproduction branch.

rationale.zh: This determines which gene loses its outgoing edges and must not be guessed.
rationale.en: This determines which gene loses its outgoing edges and must not be guessed.

rationale.zh: It determines whether real WT/KO manuscript branches may enter the execution plan.
rationale.en: It determines whether real WT/KO manuscript branches may enter the execution plan.

description.zh: Read the WT input matrix state from the manifest.
description.en: Read the WT input matrix state from the manifest.

rationale.zh: The wrapper must not silently assume whether the input is normalized.
rationale.en: The wrapper must not silently assume whether the input is normalized.

rationale.zh: The source code uses quantile(abs(X), 0.95) to filter low-weight edges.
rationale.en: The source code uses quantile(abs(X), 0.95) to filter low-weight edges.

rationale.zh: The directionality helper defaults to lambda = 1 in the source code.
rationale.en: The directionality helper defaults to lambda = 1 in the source code.

rationale.zh: A fixed result bundle keeps smoke tests, report regeneration, and reproducibility records consistent.
rationale.en: A fixed result bundle keeps smoke tests, report regeneration, and reproducibility records consistent.

rationale.zh: Default to validating the contract and runtime before executing the full analysis.
rationale.en: Default to validating the contract and runtime before executing the full analysis.

decision_rules.detailsZh: If only WT input is available, keep the workflow on the virtual-knockout core path and do not merge manuscript reproduction scripts into the minimum contract.
decision_rules.detailsEn: If only WT input is available, keep the workflow on the virtual-knockout core path and do not merge manuscript reproduction scripts into the minimum contract.

decision_rules.titleZh: Block native execution when a required runtime is missing
decision_rules.titleEn: Block native execution when a required runtime is missing
decision_rules.detailsZh: If Rscript is unavailable, emit a structured blocked status instead of pretending the method already ran.
decision_rules.detailsEn: If Rscript is unavailable, emit a structured blocked status instead of pretending the method already ran.

workflow_steps.name: 00_validate_input
workflow_steps.detailsZh: Validate WT matrix path, matrix orientation, raw-count state, and knockout gene.
workflow_steps.detailsEn: Validate WT matrix path, matrix orientation, raw-count state, and knockout gene.

workflow_steps.name: 01_preprocess_expression_matrix
workflow_steps.detailsZh: Filter genes and cells, confirm matrix orientation, and prepare the WT expression matrix.
workflow_steps.detailsEn: Filter genes and cells, confirm matrix orientation, and prepare the WT expression matrix.

workflow_steps.name: 02_construct_wt_scgrn
workflow_steps.detailsZh: Construct the wild-type single-cell gene regulatory network.
workflow_steps.detailsEn: Construct the wild-type single-cell gene regulatory network.

workflow_steps.name: 03_simulate_gene_knockout
workflow_steps.detailsZh: Simulate knockout by perturbing target-gene regulatory edges.
workflow_steps.detailsEn: Simulate knockout by perturbing target-gene regulatory edges.

workflow_steps.name: 04_run_manifold_alignment
workflow_steps.detailsZh: Align WT and KO network manifolds.
workflow_steps.detailsEn: Align WT and KO network manifolds.

workflow_steps.name: 05_calculate_differential_regulation
workflow_steps.detailsZh: Calculate differential regulation between WT and KO networks.
workflow_steps.detailsEn: Calculate differential regulation between WT and KO networks.

workflow_steps.name: 06_rank_perturbed_genes
workflow_steps.detailsZh: Rank genes by perturbation or differential-regulation score.
workflow_steps.detailsEn: Rank genes by perturbation or differential-regulation score.

workflow_steps.name: 07_run_pathway_enrichment
workflow_steps.detailsZh: Run optional pathway or GO enrichment when organism and database support it.
workflow_steps.detailsEn: Run optional pathway or GO enrichment when organism and database support it.

workflow_steps.name: 08_generate_report
workflow_steps.detailsZh: Generate QC summary, ranked outputs, interpretation caveats, and reproducibility metadata.
workflow_steps.detailsEn: Generate QC summary, ranked outputs, interpretation caveats, and reproducibility metadata.

dag_edges.detail: Both steps operate on the same declared variable(s): wt_expression_matrix
Previous output feeds current input: prepared/wt_matrix.csv
Previous output feeds current input: models/wt_scgrn.csv
Previous output feeds current input: models/ko_scgrn.csv
Previous output feeds current input: results/manifold_alignment.json
Previous output feeds current input: results/differential_regulation.csv
Previous output feeds current input: results/perturbed_gene_ranking.csv
Both steps operate on the same declared variable(s): results/perturbed_gene_ranking.csv

native_run_status.reason: The generated child skill keeps dry-run behavior until a source-backed adapter is explicitly implemented and tested.

rules.zh: Check whether the WT matrix path, orientation, count state, and knockout gene satisfy the contract.
rules.en: Check whether the WT matrix path, orientation, count state, and knockout gene satisfy the contract.
rules.passZh: The input contract passes and execution planning may continue.
rules.passEn: The input contract passes and execution planning may continue.
rules.warnZh: The dry-run only completed preflight checks and has not produced method-level QC conclusions.
rules.warnEn: The dry-run only completed preflight checks and has not produced method-level QC conclusions.
rules.failZh: The input violates the contract and the output must not be treated as a reliable executed analysis.
rules.failEn: The input violates the contract and the output must not be treated as a reliable executed analysis.

rules.zh: Check that gene names are retained and that a normalized matrix is not misrepresented as raw counts.
rules.en: Check that gene names are retained and that a normalized matrix is not misrepresented as raw counts.
rules.passZh: The object state satisfies the prerequisites for a single-cell perturbation workflow.
rules.passEn: The object state satisfies the prerequisites for a single-cell perturbation workflow.
rules.warnZh: Part of the object state still depends on manifest declarations and should be verified before a full run.
rules.warnEn: Part of the object state still depends on manifest declarations and should be verified before a full run.
rules.failZh: The object state is inconsistent with the method requirements.
rules.failEn: The object state is inconsistent with the method requirements.

rules.zh: Check whether Python and Rscript are available.
rules.en: Check whether Python and Rscript are available.
rules.warnZh: The dry-run may continue, but native execution has not yet consumed the method runtime.
rules.warnEn: The dry-run may continue, but native execution has not yet consumed the method runtime.
rules.failZh: A required runtime is missing and the wrapper should return a blocked status.
rules.failEn: A required runtime is missing and the wrapper should return a blocked status.

validation_scenarios.zh: Minimum smoke test: valid manifest, successful dry-run, and a complete result bundle.
validation_scenarios.en: Minimum smoke test: valid manifest, successful dry-run, and a complete result bundle.

validation_scenarios.zh: Missing-runtime test: simulate a missing Rscript and return blocked_runtime_missing.
validation_scenarios.en: Missing-runtime test: simulate a missing Rscript and return blocked_runtime_missing.

interpretation_boundary.zh: A pass only means the contract and preflight checks succeeded; it does not mean the biological conclusion is already established.
interpretation_boundary.en: A pass only means the contract and preflight checks succeeded; it does not mean the biological conclusion is already established.

interpretation_boundary.zh: A warning means the output may guide planning or reporting, but caveats must remain visible.
interpretation_boundary.en: A warning means the output may guide planning or reporting, but caveats must remain visible.

interpretation_boundary.zh: A failure means the output must not be written up as a reliable conclusion.
interpretation_boundary.en: A failure means the output must not be written up as a reliable conclusion.

bundle_notes.zh: Even a dry-run must emit the full directory structure and a machine-readable result.json.
bundle_notes.en: Even a dry-run must emit the full directory structure and a machine-readable result.json.

bundle_notes.zh: Do not silently rewrite manuscript-reproduction artifacts as if they were core-method conclusions.
bundle_notes.en: Do not silently rewrite manuscript-reproduction artifacts as if they were core-method conclusions.

capture_items.zh: Input manifest path and key state fields.
capture_items.en: Input manifest path and key state fields.

capture_items.zh: Runtime probe results, planned commands, and installation records.
capture_items.en: Runtime probe results, planned commands, and installation records.

install_policy.zh: If the target runtime environment lacks dependencies, install them only inside that environment and record the commands under reproducibility.
install_policy.en: If the target runtime environment lacks dependencies, install them only inside that environment and record the commands under reproducibility.

smoke_scenarios.zh: The dry-run generates the full bundle.
smoke_scenarios.en: The dry-run generates the full bundle.

smoke_scenarios.zh: validate-output fails when report.md is missing.
smoke_scenarios.en: validate-output fails when report.md is missing.

items.label: scTenifoldKnk: An efficient virtual knockout tool for gene function predictions via single-cell gene regulatory network perturbation
README.md
items.noteZh: Repository overview plus input and output guidance.
items.noteEn: Repository overview plus input and output guidance.

failureModes.conditionZh: The input object state is inconsistent with the contract
failureModes.conditionEn: The input object state is inconsistent with the contract
failureModes.recoveryZh: Require the user to correct the manifest and explicitly declare object state instead of letting the wrapper guess.
failureModes.recoveryEn: Require the user to correct the manifest and explicitly declare object state instead of letting the wrapper guess.

failureModes.recoveryZh: Return blocked_runtime_missing and retry after installing the required runtime in the target environment.
failureModes.recoveryEn: Return blocked_runtime_missing and retry after installing the required runtime in the target environment.

failureModes.conditionZh: The user treats manuscript reproduction branches as core-method input requirements
failureModes.conditionEn: The user treats manuscript reproduction branches as core-method input requirements
failureModes.recoveryZh: Label reproduction branches explicitly in the report and keep the WT-only path as the minimum execution contract.
failureModes.recoveryEn: Label reproduction branches explicitly in the report and keep the WT-only path as the minimum execution contract.
